title: Smoky Ukrainian Potatoes Hash
description: A smoky and crunchy Ukrainian dish featuring small potatoes, yuzu-cure, and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients. Perfect for a romantic dinner or a weeknight meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté for 3 minutes, until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the halved potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, until they start to brown.
Add the yuzu-cure and smoked paprika, and stir to combine.
Cook for another 5 minutes, until the potatoes are golden brown and crispy.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Note: if the potatoes start to stick to the pan, add a little bit of water to deglaze the pan.
